creator: bas@area536.com
text:
Building through Poudriere (non-dev version) on 14.0-BETA3 for same. Getting the following build error:

===>  Patching for lame-3.100_4
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for lame-3.100_4 from /usr/ports/audio/lame/files
sed: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/lame/work/lame-3.100/libmp3lame/i386/Makefile.ir: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
